body:
Implementation plan added to issue description.

- New files: `src/types/collaboration.ts`, `src/lib/collaboration.ts`, `src/components/CollabPanel/*`
- Modified: `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx`, `page.module.css`
- Key decisions: v1 is single-user localStorage (no real-time sync); decision records are immutable after creation; assignee is free-text; sidebar expands to 'collab' tab mode; unresolved badge shown on sidebar tab label and optionally in editorHeader

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous BIN-80 stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled.
